summary: Drop archived spec.yaml from publish artifacts; keep spec_format + spec_checksum + spec_source in manifest as reference.
reason: Bundled twilio/sendgrid-oai spec is 37,685 lines / 1.4MB and pushed the PR over Greptile's automated-review size cap (PR was 511 files / 126K lines / 5.1MB; Greptile timed out 3x in a row even after auto-nudge). The spec is not read at runtime (`grep spec.yaml internal/ cmd/` returns nothing), 45 of 135 published library CLIs already ship without it per AGENTS.md ("some CLIs have no archived spec on disk"), and the manifest carries `spec_format: openapi3` + sha256 checksum + the bundle origin URL so the reference is durable and reproducible.
validated_outcome: Diff shrinks ~37,685 lines (-30%). spec_checksum stays in manifest so anyone wanting to verify the spec used at print time can re-bundle from twilio/sendgrid-oai and compare. No runtime impact (CLI is already generated; spec was a generation-time input).
